AboutPage.description: At GreenVolt Energie, we are passionate about renewable energy and sustainable solutions that reduce costs and protect the environment. Our team consists of experienced solar engineers, energy consultants, and technicians who work together to transform buildings into efficient energy sources. Since our founding, we've helped homeowners and businesses across Germany switch to clean solar power with tailored photovoltaic systems, battery storage, and smart home integration. We believe in transparency, quality craftsmanship, and long-term partnerships. Whether you're a homeowner or a commercial enterprise, we're here to guide your journey to energy independence with expertise, technology, and commitment.
AboutPage.title: About Us

FAQ.title: Frequently asked questions
FAQ.noAnswer: Didn't find an answer to your question?
FAQ.q1: How quickly can a solar system be installed at my place?
FAQ.a1: Installation usually takes 1-3 days, depending on the size of the system. From the first consultation to commissioning, it typically takes 4-8 weeks, including permits and grid registration.
FAQ.q2: What subsidies are available for photovoltaic systems?
FAQ.a2: In Germany there are various subsidies: feed-in tariffs, KfW funding loans and regional grants. We advise you individually and help with applying for all available subsidies.
FAQ.q3: Do I need a battery storage for my solar system?
FAQ.a3: A storage system significantly increases your self-sufficiency – from about 30% to up to 80%. Especially useful with high self-consumption or if you want to benefit from solar power at night as well.
FAQ.q4: How much does a solar system cost?
FAQ.a4: Costs vary depending on size and equipment. A typical single-family home system (10 kWp) costs about €12,000-18,000. Through subsidies and electricity savings, the system pays for itself in 8-12 years.
FAQ.q5: How much electricity can my solar system produce?
FAQ.a5: In Germany, 1 kWp of solar capacity produces about 900-1,100 kWh per year. A 10 kWp system fully covers the annual needs of a typical 4-person household.
FAQ.q6: What happens during a power outage?
FAQ.a6: Standard solar systems shut down during a grid outage. With an emergency power or full storage system, you can continue using electricity during a blackout – we advise you on the best options.

Reviews.title: ...and what our customers say
Reviews.r1Text: "The solar system from GreenVolt drastically reduced our energy costs. Perfect solution for our single-family home – professional advice and fast installation."
Reviews.r2Text: Since installing our photovoltaic system, we save over €200 monthly. Combining it with battery storage was the right decision – ROI reached after just 18 months.
Reviews.r3Text: Finally independent from electricity prices. GreenVolt's smart home system automatically optimizes our energy consumption. Our CO₂ emissions have dropped by 90%.

Footer.subtitle: Free solar consultation – we identify your energy potential in 30 minutes.
